<sentence>The cargo bed itself is a large, open container, usually with high sides and a tailgate at the rear for loading and unloading.</sentence>
<sentence>Beneath the main body, robust wheels are mounted, emphasizing the truck's ground clearance and load-bearing capabilities.</sentence>
<sentence>The chassis connects the cab and the cargo bed, a strong, underlying frame that supports the entire structure.</sentence>
<sentence>The truck's shape communicates strength, durability, and a clear purpose for transporting goods across varied terrains.</sentence>
